subject: 2-Factor Authentication Review - IT Operations
body:
Hello CloudVenture Colleague,

This is a formal notice from the Identity & Access Management regarding a scheduled 2-factor authentication across the organization.

CONTEXT:
As part of our ongoing operational review, all teams are asked to complete a brief review of current records and policy updates related to Access Management services. This supports the annual compliance cycle and aligns with internal audit timelines.

WHAT YOU NEED TO DO:
1. Review the materials provided in the attached memo
2. Confirm that your team has acknowledged the notice internally
3. Ensure departmental records are current for this review cycle

REFERENCE MATERIAL:
- Attached PDF memo
- QR code included in the memo for reference

TIMELINE:
Please review this week. If your team has already completed this review, you can disregard this notice.

ADDITIONAL NOTES:
- This review is aligned with standard organizational procedures
- No sensitive information should be sent via email
- The memo provides all necessary documents and guidance

If you have questions, contact IT Operations Help Desk at support@cloudventure.com.

Regards,

Sarah Identity & Access Management
CloudVenture - IT Operations
